name: Foxit PDF
description: Foxit PDF — PDF SDK and cloud service for viewing, editing, signing, and form-filling in web and mobile apps.

seo.title: Foxit PDF — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Foxit PDF: Foxit PDF — PDF SDK and cloud service for viewing, editing, signing, and form-filling in web and mobile apps.

when_to_use: PDF viewing, editing, and form-filling SDK for web apps
Digital signature and e-sign workflows in mobile applications
Embedding a full PDF viewer in web and enterprise portals
PDF annotation tools for collaborative review in SaaS
Lower-cost Acrobat SDK alternative for document-heavy apps

pros: Mature PDF SDK, cheaper than Adobe/Apryse
Lower memory footprint on mobile than rivals
Works offline in web and native apps
cons: Docs and samples feel dated in spots
review.verdict: Solid Apryse alternative at a lower price point — polish and DX lag, but features cover most enterprise needs.
review.best_for: Cost-sensitive enterprises needing full PDF SDK across platforms without Adobe pricing.
review.not_for: Teams wanting modern, API-first SaaS experience.
